build_approach.compile_example: ./compile.sh build BOARD=atomic-pi BRANCH=current BUILD_DESKTOP=yes BUILD_MINIMAL=no DESKTOP_ENVIRONMENT=xfce DESKTOP_TIER=mid KERNEL_CONFIGURE=no RELEASE=trixie
profiles: atomicpi-desktop  (11000 MB, XFCE — first successful build)

hardware_notes.audio: XMOS xCORE USB audio → TI TAS5719 class-D amp → powered outputs. GPIO 349 deasserted at boot by atomicpi-hold-xmos.service.

v1_milestone.name: Atomicty_Pi v0.1
v1_milestone.description: First functional build meeting the documented baseline
criteria: Debian Trixie, Armbian uefi-x86, current kernel
ext4 root, systemd-networkd minimal + NetworkManager server images

stages.name: armbian-base-build
stages.description: compile.sh builds atomic-pi Trixie base image
steps: Rootfs with Debian Trixie + Armbian packages assembled

stages.name: customize-image
stages.description: overlay rsync + service enable + DKMS modules

stages.name: flash-and-test
stages.description: Flash to USB/eMMC, run firstboot.sh, work through test-matrix.md

pivot_history.reason: Armbian already maintains uefi-x86/Trixie at Standard tier.

pivot_history.to: multi-profile configs + overlay/ tree + extensions/ hook
pivot_history.reason: Cleaner separation: static files in overlay, package injection in extension hooks, runtime steps only in customize-image.sh.
Named board appears in ./compile.sh interactive menu. Board config symlinked from repo into Armbian clone by build scripts.

issues.description: USERPATCHES_PATH=... passed as compile.sh cmdline arg is unconditionally overridden by entrypoint.sh:119.
issues.fix: Symlink armbian/userpatches/* into ~/src/armbian-build/userpatches/ before calling compile.sh.

issues.description: customize-image.sh referenced $RELEASE as env var; Armbian passes it as positional arg $1 inside chroot.
issues.fix: Added RELEASE=${1:-} LINUXFAMILY=${2:-} BOARD=${3:-} BUILD_DESKTOP=${4:-} ARCH=${5:-} at top of script.

issues.description: DKMS build failed in non-dev profiles because INSTALL_HEADERS=no means no kernel headers in image.
issues.fix: Guard in customize-image.sh: skip DKMS if /lib/modules/${KVER}/build does not exist.

notes.msg: XMOS card name in asound.conf is 'XMOS'. Verify with 'aplay -l' on first live boot.
sysfs GPIO (/sys/class/gpio/) is deprecated since ~5.3 but present in 6.x. If removed, switch services to 'gpioset' from gpiod package.
SSH hardened: PasswordAuthentication no. Users must set a key via preset-firstrun.sh or on first boot.
BIOS default boot order after CMOS reset may prioritize PXE over eMMC. Document after first hardware test.
First image built is desktop/XFCE (selected via interactive menu). Next: build minimal profile via ./scripts/build-minimal.sh and flash to hardware.
